protocol.strict_mdd: pre-entry high water plus favorable-then-adverse intrabar marking
protocol.warning: 1,280 fourth-stage interactions, 29,133 prior interactions, and broader OOS exposure; retrospective shadow evidence

operating_point.reason: highest tested leverage that keeps baseline and isolated 10bp/side full-period strict MDD below 15% while exceeding 50% CAGR

multiplicity.interpretation: backtest p-values are descriptive after search; fresh forward evidence is required
